lrz-sbatch-cpu: 🔧 Submit LRZ CPU batch job (requires ARIA_DSS and LRZ_CMD)
lrz-sbatch-multigpu: 🔧 Submit LRZ multi-GPU torchrun batch job (requires ARIA_DSS and LRZ_CMD)
